name: Wickie Fort
tagline: Simple, cozy recipes from Wickie’s Kitchen.
heroSub: Everyday recipes and kitchen favorites made to feel warm, doable, and a little bit special.

aboutParagraphs.text: Wickie’s Kitchen started the way most good things do: with people I love, gathered around a table, asking for the recipe.

I cook the kind of food that fits into a real week — unfussy, comforting, and worth making twice. Think slow weekend bakes, fast weeknight dinners, and the little kitchen habits that make everyday cooking feel good.
This is where I share those recipes and the home-and-lifestyle bits in between. Pull up a chair.

recipes.title: Brown Butter Banana Bread
recipes.blurb: Deeply cozy, one bowl, and better on day two. The loaf everyone asks for.

recipes.title: Weeknight Lemon Orzo
recipes.blurb: Bright, buttery, and on the table in 20 minutes. A back-pocket dinner.

recipes.title: Tomato Soup & Crispy Grilled Cheese
recipes.blurb: The comfort classic, done right — silky soup and a proper golden crust.

recipes.title: Honey Garlic Salmon
recipes.blurb: Sticky, sweet, and roasted on one pan. Weeknight-easy, dinner-party-good.

recipes.title: Maple Cinnamon Granola
recipes.blurb: Clustery, warmly spiced, and made for slow mornings and gifting in jars.

recipes.title: One-Pan Herb Roast Chicken
recipes.blurb: Crisp skin, jammy vegetables, and a whole meal from a single pan.

workIntro: I partner with brands I genuinely love to create warm, appetizing content that feels at home in Wickie’s Kitchen — not like an ad. If your product belongs in a real kitchen, let’s talk.
